Use if you suspect the wrong file is linked. Breaks the connection and walks you through selecting the correct file.
Auto-Update App File
Link this HTML file so the embedded backup stays current on every save — prevents stale data after reboot.
🌐 Local Web Server
⚠ Running as local file
Auto-save to file is disabled on file://. Your data is safe in localStorage & IDB. Use Export Backup as your manual safety copy.
💡 Enable auto-save
Run a local web server from your tracker folder to unlock auto-save every 7 min, tab-switch saves, and file linking.
① Open a terminal in your tracker folder and run:
python -m http.server 8080
② Then open in Chrome:
http://localhost:8080/
not saved

No backup file linked
Your data is only in browser memory. Create or relink a backup file to enable auto-save every 10 minutes.

A new version is available — download the latest from your START_HERE link
↓ Download Update
⚠
Auto-save permission lost
Your browser lost write access to the data file (common on Mac after restarting Chrome or Brave). Click Restore Access to reconnect — your data is safe in the browser.
🦁
Brave on Mac — numbered backup copies detected
Brave on Mac sometimes creates numbered copies (portfolio_data (1).json, (2) etc.) instead of saving in-place.
Fix: In Brave → Settings → Downloads, set the download folder to your Portfolio Tracker working folder. Then unlink and re-link your data file below.
⚙ Brave Downloads Setting

⚖️ IL Break-Even Calculator Model impermanent loss vs yield before entering a pool
Pool Setup
Price Scenario
Enter e.g. 6 if you expect prices to move up to 6% apart in either direction (not ±3 each — just 6)
Break-Even Days by ± Divergence
How many days you must stay in the pool for yield to fully recover IL — at each possible price divergence level. Your scenario is highlighted.

✓ = recovers within your hold period  ·  — = no IL at this divergence  ·  amber = needs longer than your target

WELCOME TO PORTFOLIO TRACKER

Tip: After importing, click ⛁ Link Backup in the header to enable
auto-save every 10 minutes so you never lose data again.
ADD LP POOL
Concentrated liquidity — IL is amplified within your price range. Range bounds required.
🔒 Vault mode — IL math not used. Model selection is for reference only. Current $ value is tracked directly.
Typical values: stablecoins 200–2000, semi-stable (stETH/ETH) 50–200. Higher A = less IL.
e.g. 80 for an 80/20 pool (Token B = remaining 20%). Standard pool = 50.
💡 VFAT is a UI aggregator — set the model based on the underlying pool (e.g. Uniswap v3 if VFAT is routing into a v3 pool on Aerodrome or Orca).
Sets the current $ value shown in the pool row. Update anytime via the Quick Yield panel (▶ Log).
Like-Pair Vault — Single Asset Entry
Token A
Token B
If this pool pays rewards in a separate token (e.g. AERO, JOE), set it here so harvests auto-fill.
Silent = no phone alerts. Sensitive halves cooldowns (use for Vol/Stable like ETH/USDC).
Pre-selects this wallet every time you log yield for this pool. Overridable per-harvest in the yield panel.
📤 Funded From Holdings — tokens deducted from Holdings when pool is saved
Optional — specify which tokens and wallets funded this position. Quantities will be deducted from Holdings automatically.

Steps on Hyperliquid
💵 HYPERLIQUID TRANSFER
CLOSE HEDGE POSITION
🔔 PRICE ALERTS —
📥 Buy More Trigger
📤 Take Profit Ladder (price rises to)
🔔 Alerts fire via Pushover with distinct sounds — buy triggers use a cash register tone, take-profit targets use a magic chime, stop-loss uses a siren. Leave any field blank to disable that alert.
⚙ EDIT POOL RECORD
CLOSE / REBALANCE POOL
📤 Where do closed funds go?
Token quantities added back to Holdings at current prices — cost basis updated.
📥 Tokens returning from LP — enter exactly what came back from the platform
Current: —
Current: —
Computed USD return: — (at live prices — compare to the platform's exit value as a sanity check)
📥 What came back from the vault? Added to Holdings on close
Add one row per token received. Leave blank to log as external withdrawal only.
📤 Partial Withdrawal — pool stays open
🚨 Loss / Dispute Flag (optional — for hacks, legal actions, pending recoveries)
Return closes the pool if you entered the full Current qty; otherwise it's a partial withdrawal (pool stays open).
Confirm Action
Review the destinations above. Cancel to adjust quantities or wallets; Confirm to proceed.
Rebalance — Enter New Leg
Exit leg complete — tokens are in Holdings. Enter the new position below. Tokens will be deducted from Holdings at live prices. Cancel fully reverts the rebalance (pool, Holdings, history).
📊 New leg position
Estimate will populate from qtys × live prices
📥 Source wallets — Holdings deduction
Cannot Restore
This restore cannot proceed because Holdings have changed since the close. Reverting would leave one or more tokens with a negative quantity, or would reference a Holdings row that has been deleted.
Issues blocking reversal
    What you can do: either acquire the missing tokens back, manually adjust the relevant Holdings rows before trying again, or import a backup from before the close and work from there.
    Restore — Review Warnings
    Holdings can be reverted cleanly for this entry, but transactions occurred on affected tokens or wallets since the close. The reversal will undo only the close itself — the subsequent transactions below will remain in place. Review before proceeding.
    Transactions since close
      After restore, verify your Holdings values match what you expect. Manual adjustment may be needed if any of the above transactions should also be reversed.
      ADD VAULT
      For single-asset yield positions — lending vaults, staking, LSTs (e.g. Scallop, Drift, Marinade).
      For Beefy-style LP pools, use the LP Pools tab with Vault Mode enabled instead.
      💡 How to update yield: Open your platform (e.g. Scallop, Drift) and find the total current value of this vault position. Enter that amount here — the tracker calculates yield automatically as Current Value − Entry Value.
      This is different from LP Pools — the Vault tab tracks single-asset yield positions like lending vaults and staking, not Beefy-style LP pools.
      📤 Close Vault — where do funds go?
      🚨 Loss / Dispute Flag (optional)
      📤 Funded From Holdings — tokens deducted from Holdings when vault is saved
      Optional — specify which tokens and wallets funded this vault. Quantities will be deducted from Holdings automatically.
      ADD HOLDING
      Action
      Proceeds added to cash (stablecoin) Holdings. Row reduced or removed if fully sold.
      Stablecoin — locked at $1.00
      → Receiving
      Leave blank to transfer entire holding
      Cost basis carries over exactly — no price needed. A Transfer transaction is logged.
      ✎ EDIT YIELD ENTRY
      ➕ ADD YIELD ENTRY

      Add a historical or backdated yield entry directly to any pool's log. Use this to record harvests that predate the tracker or were missed.

      💸 LOG TRANSACTION

      Record a new purchase, swap, or internal move. This logs the transaction and optionally updates Holdings and portfolio cost basis.

      ADD GEM
      Paste from the project's official site or a verified block explorer to avoid scam tokens.
      💡 Entry price, targets, stop loss and buy triggers are all set inside the expansion panel — click ▶ on the GEM row after adding.
      ✔ CONFIRM TP EXECUTED
      THESIS
      ⛁ LINK BACKUP FILE

      Your portfolio data is saved to a .json file in your working folder.
      All saves go there — not to browser cache. Link or create a file to protect your data.

      💡 New user? Click Create New Backup File — a Save dialog opens.
      Navigate to your working folder (same folder as this HTML file), name the file, and click Save. The file is created there and auto-linked.

      ⚠ Updating from a previous version? Export your backup from 💾 Data ▾ → Save / Export Backup first, then reconnect to that file here after updating.
      ⚠ BACKUP FILE DISCONNECTED

      Your browser cache was cleared, which severed the connection to your backup file.

      You must reconnect your backup file before continuing — this ensures your data loads from the correct location and auto-save resumes properly.

      ⚠ Updating from a previous version? Always export your backup from 💾 Data ▾ → Save / Export Backup before installing a new version, then reconnect here.

      No cancel — reconnection is required to proceed safely.
      📝 POSITION NOTE
      ♻ HISTORY BIN — Deleted Entries

      These entries were deleted but can be restored at any time. Use ↩ Restore to bring one back, or ✕ Remove to permanently delete it.

      Pool · Platform Type Entry Date Close Date Deleted On
      ➕ ADD CLOSED POOL ENTRY

      Manually record a pool that was closed or rebalanced. All fields except Pool Name are optional.

      📂 SMART IMPORT — REVIEW CHANGES

      Your tracker already has data. Review the differences below and choose which sections to import. Unchecked sections will NOT be overwritten — your existing data stays.

      Section Current In File Difference Action
      ⚠ Checked sections will replace your current data for that section. Unchecked sections are preserved exactly as-is.
      ⚙ SETTINGS
      📊 CPI Benchmark Badge
      %
      Green badge on pool rows when annualized net return beats this rate.
      💼 Default DeFi Wallet
      Set this once and it will be the default wallet across yield logging, TP execute, and pool close flows. Overridable per transaction.
      📊 GEM Data Collection
      minutes  (5–60)
      How often a Vol/MC reading is recorded. 10 min works well for up to ~60 GEMs. Increase if you see a storage warning.
      %  (24h change)
      System-wide mover alert threshold. Individual GEMs can override this in their own settings.
      📱 Phone Alerts — Pushover
      Pushover delivers instant alerts to your phone whenever a GEM hits a buy trigger, stop loss, take-profit target, or moves beyond your alert threshold — works from any device, no browser required.
      Get keys at pushover.net (~$5 one-time app purchase). Enter both keys below to activate.
      🔕 Alert Cooldowns — minimum time between repeat notifications
      min
      Pool fully out of range. Default 30 min.
      min
      Close to edge — urgent. Default 20 min.
      min
      Approaching edge — informational. Default 60 min.
      min
      GEM movers, targets, SL. Default 20 min.
      Sensitive pools (set per-pool) use half these cooldowns. Silent pools never send Pushover.
      🏊 Pool Range Alert Thresholds
      e.g. 10% on range (0.04–0.05) = triggers at 0.0409–0.0491
      e.g. 20% on range (0.04–0.05) = triggers at 0.0418–0.0482
      Per-pool overrides available in each pool's edit modal.
      Alerts sent via Pushover:
      🟢 BUY TRIGGER — price reaches your entry alert
      ⛔ STOP LOSS — price drops to your stop loss
      🎯 TARGET HIT — price reaches T1 / T2 / T3
      📈 MOVER — 24h change exceeds your alert % threshold
      ⚠ POOL RANGE — LP pool goes out of range
      🔒 PIN Protection
      How long before the tracker locks itself after inactivity.
      No PIN set — tracker is unprotected.

      ? HELP
      🔍
      Editing help for the current tab. Each section has a heading and body text.
      Use <strong>bold</strong> for bold, <br> for line breaks, to insert image 1, etc.
      After saving, click ⬆ Export to GitHub in the header to download help-content.json — then upload it to your GitHub repo to publish to all users.
